form.formComment: Two runs so far have been ordinary, the latest when beaten 16 lengths into seventh over 450m at this track. This looks a nice race so she can improve.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 6th in a Maiden on March 30 over 390m at this track behind Paw Xela beaten 9 lengths (23.23). Has performed below expectations at her last couple but is capable of far better.

form.formComment: Has raced six times and is overdue for a win, the latest offering a second (24.69) over 425m at Bendigo. Has finished in the money at the last two starts. Looks the testing material.
